hindi: जय अम्बे गौरी, मैया जय श्यामा गौरी। तुमको निशदिन ध्यावत, हरि ब्रह्मा शिवरी॥
english: Victory to Amba Gauri; Hari, Brahma and Shiva meditate on you day and night
roman: Jai Ambe Gauri, Maiya Jai Shyama Gauri, Tumko Nishadin Dhyavat Hari Brahma Shivari

hindi: माँग सिंदूर विराजत, टीको मृगमद को। उज्ज्वल से दोउ नैना, चंद्रवदन नीको॥
english: Vermillion adorns her parting, a musk mark on her forehead; two bright eyes, beautiful moon-like face
roman: Mang Sindoor Virajat Tiko Mrigmad Ko, Ujjwal Se Dou Naina Chandravadan Niko

hindi: कनक समान कलेवर, रक्ताम्बर राजे। रक्त पुष्प गल माला, कण्ठहार साजे॥
english: Her body is like gold, wearing crimson garments; a garland of red flowers adorns her neck beautifully
roman: Kanak Samaan Kalevar Raktambar Raje, Rakt Pushpa Gal Mala Kanthhar Saaje

hindi: केहरि वाहन राजत, खड्ग खप्परधारी। सुर-नर-मुनिजन सेवत, तिनके दुखहारी॥
english: Riding the lion, bearing sword and skull-cup; gods, humans and sages serve her, she removes all their sorrows
roman: Kehri Vahan Rajat Khadga Khappar Dhari, Sur Nar Munijan Sevat Tinke Dukh Hari

hindi: जय अम्बे गौरी, मैया जय श्यामा गौरी। तुमको निशदिन ध्यावत, हरि ब्रह्मा शिवरी॥
english: Victory to Amba Gauri; Hari, Brahma and Shiva meditate on you day and night
roman: Jai Ambe Gauri, Maiya Jai Shyama Gauri, Tumko Nishadin Dhyavat Hari Brahma Shivari
